caption: Did you know sleep directly impacts your immune system? 🛋️💤 At night, your body produces cytokines to fight off infections. Lack of sleep can weaken this process. 🌃 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to prioritize sleep. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you 🙏 #sleepimmunity #healthyliving #immunesystem #sleepscience #wellness
